description: Eval Harness hooks: PostToolUse eval interception and PreToolUse conda environment guard.

hooks.prompt: An agent subagent (Task tool) just completed. Review the tool result. If it contains a substantive agent output (not a system message, tool call result, or short conversational reply), trigger the eval-harness pipeline by launching the judge-agent to evaluate it. Skip evaluation for: empty results, error messages, and outputs under 20 words. If evaluation is triggered, follow the eval-methodology skill.
